chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. S – 328 of 2021 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on MA No.3571/2021 (U/A) 2. For orders on MA No.3572/2021 (Ex./A) 3. For hearing of bail application 02-07-2021 Mr. Danish Ali Bhatti, Advocate for applicant / accused..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Urgency is granted. 2 & 3. Learned counsel for the applicant / accused, under instructions from his client, does not press this Criminal Bail Application, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed along with the listed application. J U D G E Abdul Basit
